raw_response:
[
  {
    "Step_id": 1,
    "Target": "box_1",
    "Action concept": "Stabilize",
    "Manipulation mode": "Single-arm (left)",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "The left side of box_1 is reachable and there is enough clearance for the left end-effector to press gently against the box without disturbing box_2 on top. No objects obstruct the left approach path.",
    "Postcondition": "box_1 is held firmly from the left side, preventing it from sliding when forces are applied to box_2."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 2,
    "Target": "box_2",
    "Action concept": "Push",
    "Manipulation mode": "Single-arm (right)",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "The right side of box_2 is free of obstacles and there is enough tabletop space on the right for box_2 to slide. box_1 is being stabilized by the left arm.",
    "Postcondition": "box_2 is detached from box_1 and slid to an open area on the tabletop to the right of box_1, leaving the top of box_1 fully exposed."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 3,
    "Target": "box_1",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "box_2 is no longer on top of box_1. Both arms have unobstructed lateral access to the sides of box_1, and sufficient vertical clearance exists to lift it.",
    "Postcondition": "box_1 is securely held between the two arms and lifted clear of the tabletop, accomplishing the task of picking up the darker box."
  }
]

parsed_json.Precondition: The left side of box_1 is reachable and there is enough clearance for the left end-effector to press gently against the box without disturbing box_2 on top. No objects obstruct the left approach path.
parsed_json.Postcondition: box_1 is held firmly from the left side, preventing it from sliding when forces are applied to box_2.

parsed_json.Precondition: The right side of box_2 is free of obstacles and there is enough tabletop space on the right for box_2 to slide. box_1 is being stabilized by the left arm.
parsed_json.Postcondition: box_2 is detached from box_1 and slid to an open area on the tabletop to the right of box_1, leaving the top of box_1 fully exposed.

parsed_json.Precondition: box_2 is no longer on top of box_1. Both arms have unobstructed lateral access to the sides of box_1, and sufficient vertical clearance exists to lift it.
parsed_json.Postcondition: box_1 is securely held between the two arms and lifted clear of the tabletop, accomplishing the task of picking up the darker box.
